_meta.purpose: Canonical, time-scoped geometry for historical regions/empires/tribes. Single source consumed by the timelapse (assets/js/timelapse-map.js) and, progressively, the static Maps page (assets/js/maps.js).
_meta.approximate: Boundaries are schematic teaching approximations, not survey data. Ancient borders were fluid; shapes show general extent only.
_meta.schema: regions[].periods[] lets one region carry different shapes across eras (fromYear/toYear, negative = BC). Consumers pick the period for the scene's date.
